titleStmt.title: SII 29.65: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 65. (A.R. No. 62 of 1961-62.) KOLANUPĀKA, BHUVANAGIRI TALUK, NALGONDA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Second pillar in the Museum (Museum No. 82.)

It registers a gift of income from pārikhāya tax (?) collected from the villages belonging to the temple of Sōmēśvara for burning a perpetual lamp there in by Gōpatayayya, the pergaḍe of mahāpradhāna bāṇasaverggaḍe daṇḍanāyaka Anantapālayya when Chālukya Tribhuvanamalla was ruling from Kalyāṇapura. It also registers another gift (of rice) by the Seṭṭis and the nakharas of Koḷḷipāke.

It is dated in Chālukya Vikrama year 43 [wrong for 33], (Śaka 1030) Sarvadhāri, Āshāḍha śu. 1, Thursday, Solar eclipse. It corresponds to 1108 A.D., June 12, f.d.t. 10 [Friday]. Solar eclipse occured on the previous day [Thursday].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrī
pṟithvīvallabha mahārājādhi rā
ja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka(ṁ)
satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cā
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī matribhu
vanamalladēva kalyāṇapura
da nelevīḍinoḷsukha saṁkathā vi
nōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire
tatpāda padmōpajīvi samadhiga
ta paṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmaṁ
tādhipati mahāpracaṁḍa da(ṁ)ḍanā
yakaṁ vibudha varadāyakaṁ suja
na prasaṁnaṁ nuḍidōrmutteṁnaṁ gōtra
pavitraṁ parāṁganā putraṁ tura
garēvvṛtaṁ vairi kṛttvāṁtaṁ
sōttuṁganeyyanasiṁganuṁ nāmādi sa
masta praśasti sahitaṁ śrī manma
hāpradhānaṁ bāṇasaverggaḍe daṁ
ḍanāyakananaṁntapāḷayyana pe
rggaḍe (kiḻvālḍa)ya vaḍḍarāvuḷa maṁ
bhūpaṁ nāyadadhikāri samasta rā
jyabhāra nirūpita mahāmā
tya padavipōrājamāna mānōṁ
nata prabhu maṁtrōtsāha śaktitra
ya saṁpaṁna gōpatayayyaṁ taṁnā
(ḷda)na besadiṁ śrī matkoḷḷipākaya
śrī svayaṁbhu sōmēśvara dēvarggeḷvō
rggaḷa pāribāyamaṁ śrī maccāḷu
kya vikramavarṣada 43 neya sarvva
dhāri saṁvatsara dāṣāḍha śuddha pā(ḍyapra)
(thamuṁ) bṛhaspativāradandu sū
ryagrahaṇa nimittadi dēvargge (naṁ)

kāḍaṁ naḍe
yisuvantāgi koṭṭar
śrī matkoḷḷipākeya
seṭṭigaru samasta na
khara(ṁgaḷu) sūrya
grahaṇa nimittadiṁ dēva
ra nivēdyakkaṁ dīvigege
ma(ṁga)ṟeyalū tirōbhiṁ
ge(ṁbā)dōrbaḷakeyumaṁ
(dharmma)na Aṇnayu ma
koṭṭarī dharmmama pratipā
lisuvaredakki nyāyama
sidara ppoḷegāgi
bāṇa rāsiya
lu kurukṣētradalu sā
sirvva brāhmaṇarugaḷamaṁ
sāsira kavilegaḷumaṁ
konda dōṣaṁ . sāmānyō
yaṁ dharmasētu nṛpāṇaṁ
kālē kālē pālaniyō
bhavadbhiḥ sarvvā nētā bhāvi
naḥ pārthivēṁdrān bhūyō
bhūyō yācate rāma
caṁdraḥ . bahurbhirvvasu
dā bhuktā rājabhiḥ sagarā
dhipaḥ yasyayasya ya
dā bhūmi stasya tasyata
dā phalaṁ . (svadattāṁ) paradattāṁ
(vāyō harē)ta vasuṁ
darāṁ . ṣaṣṭhirvva(rṣa) sahasrā
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyate kri
miḥ . Ēkēca bhagini
Digital edition of SII 29.65 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
